input.user_input: Delete the non-compete clause in Section 9 of the employment agreement entirely. My client has refused to agree to it.

actual: Please upload the employment agreement. Once you provide the document, I can remove the non-compete clause in Section 9 and update any affected numbering or cross-references for you.
